# Creative Commons licence badges

The standard CC 88×31 licence buttons, used by the `cc` copyright mode (see
[`src/parts/copyright.typ`](../../parts/copyright.typ)) to mirror LaTeX
acmart, whose CC permission block draws `\includegraphics{doclicense-CC-<type>-88x31}`.

## Source and licensing

These are the **official, unmodified** Creative Commons 88×31 button SVGs,
downloaded directly from Creative Commons' press kit:
<https://mirrors.creativecommons.org/presskit/buttons/88x31/svg/>.

The CC buttons are **Creative Commons trademarks** and are *not* covered by this
package's licence. They are used solely to indicate a work's Creative Commons
licence, which Creative Commons' [trademark policy](https://creativecommons.org/policies/)
permits; per that policy they are downloaded directly from Creative Commons and are
not modified, and the rendered `cc` copyright block hyperlinks each badge to the
relevant licence deed on the Creative Commons server.

Files: `cc-<type>.svg` for type ∈ {zero, by, by-sa, by-nd, by-nc, by-nc-sa, by-nc-nd}
(`cc-zero.svg` is the press kit's `cc-zero.svg`; the rest are its `<type>.svg`).
